title: chatsah #2673
definition:
1) to divide, cut in two, cut short, live half (of one's life)
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to divide
        1a2) to half, cut in two
    1b) (Niphal) to be divided
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Qal)

    1b) (Niphal) to be divided

    NASB:  to divide
